report.summary: UX audit and visual polish for 3 new pages: Token Security Scanner, Yield Tokenization Guide, and Stablecoin Yield Tracker — fixed mobile responsiveness, accessibility, and created 3 OG images.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed duplicate h1 in TokenSecurityScanner component (changed inner heading to h2 for proper heading hierarchy)
Replaced div-based chain dropdown options with semantic button elements for keyboard accessibility
Added prefers-reduced-motion media query to TokenSecurityScanner to respect user motion preferences
Fixed Stablecoin Yield Tracker stats grid (4-col) breaking on mobile — now collapses to 2-col at 768px
Fixed Stablecoin Yield Tracker card grid not stacking on mobile — now single column at 768px
Fixed Stablecoin Yield Tracker risk guide grid (3-col) not stacking on mobile — now single column at 768px
Fixed Stablecoin Yield Tracker filter row (risk/type 2-col) not stacking on mobile — now single column at 768px
Noted: Stablecoin Yield Tracker is a client component with no metadata export — needs server/client split refactor for proper SEO (logged for future sprint)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: token-security-scanner (1200x630 SVG) — shield icon, security check badges, mock score display, chain support list
OG image: yield-tokenization (1200x630 SVG) — PT/YT/SY token decomposition diagram, Pendle TVL stats, yield curve visualization
OG image: stablecoin-yield-tracker (1200x630 SVG) — key stats (9.2% top APY, $51B TVL), mini leaderboard with top 5 protocols

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: tools/token-security-scanner — Good: input validation, Enter key support, loading states, ARIA labels, responsive media queries, empty state. Fixed: duplicate h1, non-semantic dropdown, no reduced-motion support
learn/yield-tokenization-guide-2026 — Good: ToC with anchor links, category/difficulty badges, reading time, structured sections, FAQ accordions. No issues found
tools/stablecoin-yield-tracker — Good: rich filtering, sortable data, empty state, risk guide, disclaimer. Fixed: all grid layouts lacked mobile breakpoints
